highlights.board: A content production funnel on a living board
highlights.calendar: One calendar for posts and meetings

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your agency's dashboard.
login.googleError: We couldn't sign you in with Google. Please try again.

register.title: Create your agency
register.subtitle: In seconds you'll have the board, the calendar and the studio ready to go.
register.terms: By creating an account, you agree to the <termsLink>Terms of Use</termsLink> and the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to create a new password.

sent.title: Check your email
sent.subtitle: If there's an account with that address, we've sent a link to reset your password.
sent.note: The link expires in 20 minutes. Didn't get it? Check your spam folder.

reset.title: Create a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a password to get back into your account.
reset.success: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
